  "description": "At Strivo Labs, we are passionate about helping businesses scale with speed and precision. We specialise in providing end-to-end digital solutions, from custom design and MVP development to automation and content creation.

We are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Key Account Manager /&nbsp;&nbsp;Business Development Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos

About the Role


	We are seeking a highly driven and commercially focused Business Development Manager / Key Account Manager (BDM/KAM) to drive strategic partnerships and revenue growth across the banking and financial services sector.
	The ideal candidate will have a proven track record of selling B2B technology or financial solutions to banks, fintechs, microfinance banks, finance companies, and other financial institutions.
	This role is responsible for identifying new business opportunities, acquiring enterprise clients, managing strategic accounts, expanding existing relationships, and ensuring exceptional customer experience throughout the client lifecycle.
	The successful candidate will serve as a trusted advisor to clients while working closely with internal teams to deliver value, maximize account profitability, and support the company&rsquo;s long-term growth objectives.


Key Responsibilities
Business Development &amp; Revenue Growth:


	Identify, develop, and close new business opportunities within the banking, fintech, and financial services industry.
	Build and execute strategic sales plans to achieve revenue and growth targets.
	Prospect and engage decision-makers across banks, fintech companies, microfinance banks, insurance firms, finance houses, and other financial institutions.
	Prepare compelling proposals, presentations, commercial offers, and business cases.
	Lead contract negotiations and close high-value enterprise deals.
	Maintain a healthy sales pipeline and accurately forecast business opportunities.
	Achieve monthly, quarterly, and annual sales targets.


Key Account Management:


	Manage and grow relationships with assigned strategic accounts.
	Act as the primary relationship manager for key clients.
	Understand client business objectives and recommend suitable products and solutions.
	Drive account growth through upselling, cross-selling, and expansion opportunities.
	Conduct regular business review meetings with clients.
	Monitor account performance, profitability, and customer satisfaction.
	Ensure high client retention through proactive relationship management.


Client Engagement &amp; Service Delivery:


	Coordinate with Product, Operations, Customer Experience, Technology, Compliance, and Finance teams to ensure seamless service delivery.
	Ensure prompt resolution of client issues, concerns, and escalations.
	Support client onboarding, implementation, and adoption of products and services.
	Monitor service quality against agreed service levels and identify improvement opportunities.


Strategic Partnerships &amp; Market Development:


	Build and maintain strong relationships with industry stakeholders and strategic partners.
	Identify emerging opportunities within the financial services ecosystem.
	Monitor competitor activities, market trends, and customer needs.
	Provide market intelligence and customer feedback to influence product development and business strategy.


Sales Operations &amp; Reporting:


	Maintain accurate records of client interactions, sales activities, and opportunities using CRM tools.
	Prepare periodic sales reports, forecasts, and account performance updates.
	Track customer engagement, commercial performance, and revenue metrics.
	Follow up on invoices, collections, and account reconciliations where necessary.
	Ensure compliance with internal sales processes, policies, and documentation standards.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Achievement of monthly, quarterly, and annual revenue targets.
	Number and value of new enterprise clients acquired.
	Growth in revenue from existing accounts.
	Client retention and renewal rate.
	Upselling and cross-selling performance.
	Sales pipeline conversion rate.
	Customer satisfaction and engagement scores.
	Response and issue resolution turnaround time.
	Accuracy of sales forecasting and reporting.


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Economics, Finance, or a related discipline.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in Business Development, Enterprise Sales, Relationship Management, or Key Account Management.
	Mandatory experience working within or selling to the Banking, Fintech, or Financial Services industry.
	Demonstrated success in managing enterprise or corporate accounts and closing high-value B2B deals.
	Strong understanding of financial services, digital payments, lending, banking operations, or fintech solutions.
	Existing network of contacts within banks, fintechs, or other financial institutions will be an added advantage.


Required Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Strong enterprise sales and business development skills.
	Excellent relationship management and stakeholder engagement abilities.
	Strong negotiation, presentation, and communication skills.
	Commercial acumen with strong analytical and problem-solving capabilities.
	Ability to identify opportunities and convert prospects into long-term clients.
	Strong account planning and portfolio management skills.
	Excellent organizational and time management skills.
	Proficiency in CRM platforms and Microsoft Office Suite.
	Ability to&nbsp;work independently while collaborating effectively across teams.


Behavioral Competencies:


	Results-oriented with a strong commercial mindset.
	High level of professionalism, integrity, and accountability.
	Customer-focused with exceptional relationship-building skills.
	Proactive, self-motivated, and resilient.
	Strong ownership mentality with excellent follow-through.
	Collaborative and able to influence stakeholders across all levels.
	Adaptable and comfortable working in a fast-paced fintech environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send a short note on they you are a good fit and their salary expectations to: hiring@strivolabs.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Key Account Manager /  Business Development Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos

About the Role
     

            
    




	We are seeking a highly driven and commercially focused Business Development Manager / Key Account Manager (BDM/KAM) to drive strategic partnerships and revenue growth across the banking and financial services sector.
	The ideal candidate will have a proven track record of selling B2B technology or financial solutions to banks, fintechs, microfinance banks, finance companies, and other financial institutions.
	This role is responsible for identifying new business opportunities, acquiring enterprise clients, managing strategic accounts, expanding existing relationships, and ensuring exceptional customer experience throughout the client lifecycle.
	The successful candidate will serve as a trusted advisor to clients while working closely with internal teams to deliver value, maximize account profitability, and support the company’s long-term growth objectives.

Business Development & Revenue Growth:


	Identify, develop, and close new business opportunities within the banking, fintech, and financial services industry.
	Build and execute strategic sales plans to achieve revenue and growth targets.
	Prospect and engage decision-makers across banks, fintech companies, microfinance banks, insurance firms, finance houses, and other financial institutions.
	Prepare compelling proposals, presentations, commercial offers, and business cases.
	Lead contract negotiations and close high-value enterprise deals.
	Maintain a healthy sales pipeline and accurately forecast business opportunities.
	Achieve monthly, quarterly, and annual sales targets.


Key Account Management:


	Manage and grow relationships with assigned strategic accounts.
	Act as the primary relationship manager for key clients.
	Understand client business objectives and recommend suitable products and solutions.
	Drive account growth through upselling, cross-selling, and expansion opportunities.
	Conduct regular business review meetings with clients.
	Monitor account performance, profitability, and customer satisfaction.
	Ensure high client retention through proactive relationship management.


Client Engagement & Service Delivery:


	Coordinate with Product, Operations, Customer Experience, Technology, Compliance, and Finance teams to ensure seamless service delivery.
	Ensure prompt resolution of client issues, concerns, and escalations.
	Support client onboarding, implementation, and adoption of products and services.
	Monitor service quality against agreed service levels and identify improvement opportunities.


Strategic Partnerships & Market Development:


	Build and maintain strong relationships with industry stakeholders and strategic partners.
	Identify emerging opportunities within the financial services ecosystem.
	Monitor competitor activities, market trends, and customer needs.
	Provide market intelligence and customer feedback to influence product development and business strategy.


Sales Operations & Reporting:


	Maintain accurate records of client interactions, sales activities, and opportunities using CRM tools.
	Prepare periodic sales reports, forecasts, and account performance updates.
	Track customer engagement, commercial performance, and revenue metrics.
	Follow up on invoices, collections, and account reconciliations where necessary.
	Ensure compliance with internal sales processes, policies, and documentation standards.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Achievement of monthly, quarterly, and annual revenue targets.
	Number and value of new enterprise clients acquired.
	Growth in revenue from existing accounts.
	Client retention and renewal rate.
	Upselling and cross-selling performance.

	Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Economics, Finance, or a related discipline.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in Business Development, Enterprise Sales, Relationship Management, or Key Account Management.
	Mandatory experience working within or selling to the Banking, Fintech, or Financial Services industry.
	Demonstrated success in managing enterprise or corporate accounts and closing high-value B2B deals.
	Strong understanding of financial services, digital payments, lending, banking operations, or fintech solutions.
	Existing network of contacts within banks, fintechs, or other financial institutions will be an added advantage.


Required Skills & Competencies:


	Strong enterprise sales and business development skills.
	Excellent relationship management and stakeholder engagement abilities.
	Strong negotiation, presentation, and communication skills.
	Commercial acumen with strong analytical and problem-solving capabilities.
	Ability to identify opportunities and convert prospects into long-term clients.
	Strong account planning and portfolio management skills.
	Excellent organizational and time management skills.
	Proficiency in CRM platforms and Microsoft Office Suite.
	Ability to work independently while collaborating effectively across teams.


Behavioral Competencies:


	Results-oriented with a strong commercial mindset.
	High level of professionalism, integrity, and accountability.
	Customer-focused with exceptional relationship-building skills.
	Proactive, self-motivated, and resilient.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send a short note on they you are a good fit and their salary expectations to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Manager - Customer Acquisition and Compliance HQ Job at MTN Nigeria




        
    

        
        MTN Nigeria - The leader in telecommunications in Nigeria, and a part of a diverse community in Africa and the Middle East, our brand is instantly recognisable. It is through our compelling brand that we are able to attract the right talents who we carefully nurture by continuously improving our employment offerings even beyond reward and recognition.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Manager - Customer Acquisition and Compliance HQ

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Job Category: MTN Level 3
Reports To: Senior Manager - Customer Acquisition and Compliance
Division: Sales and Distribution
     

            
    



Job Description


	Develop compelling business cases for investment within relevant verticals, to assist in clearly identifying return on investment and risk. 
	Support the development and implementation of the national sales strategy within regional channels, as well as ensure that regional targets and service levels are duly met. 
	Review market and channel needs and plan and manage the procurement and distribution of SIM cards, ensuring this is in line with approved business forecast. 
	Track and administer the procurement process of approved number range, review acquisition and deployment plans /number usage and ensure availability of numbers across the country.
	Review business forecasts, track and monitor SIM procurement, SIM Card stock in channels across the regions and administer the distribution of SIM cards in line with approved plans. 
	Manage repair and swap process for SIM Registration kits and ensure subscriber details are up to date and correct as well as ensure the security and accessibility of the database. 
	Analyze target trends in trade channels within regions and monitor and prepare periodic reports on sales and distribution, SIM Card stock in channel across the regions and related trade channel activities. 
	Conduct competitive research, to find out competitors’ strategy for implementing acquisition and Registration within the region 
	Identify new markets, business within the region and act as liaison between MTNN and newly identified customers 
	Ensure effective management of customer acquisition and SIM Card Registration within the regions. 
	Coordinate, coach and influence external partners and essential support departments across MTNN’s business units to deliver a seamless pre-sales and post-sales service experience. 
	Liaise continuously with internal and external stakeholders (Regional Sales Teams, Marketing, Key Accounts Managers, etc) to ensure hitch-free operations.


Requirements


	First Degree in any related discipline  
	Fluent in English Master’s degree in Sales or Marketing will be an added advantage.
	6 - 13 years of experience which includes:
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in an area of specialization; with experience in supervising/managing others 
	Experience working in a medium to large organization 
	relevant project management experience.

        Talent Pool Resources International Limited - Our client, a reputable Microfinance institution, is recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Finance Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Microfinance

Summary


	We are seeking an experienced and strategic Finance Manager to lead its finance function and support business growth through sound financial management, regulatory compliance, and strategic financial planning.


Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Prepare accurate monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports in line with IFRS and regulatory requirements.
	Lead budgeting, forecasting, variance analysis, and financial planning.
	Manage cash flow, working capital, banking relationships, and liquidity planning.
	Strengthen internal controls, manage financial risks, and coordinate audit activities.
	Ensure timely remittance of taxes, statutory deductions, and regulatory filings.
	Provide financial analysis and strategic recommendations to support business decisions.
	Supervise, mentor, and develop the finance team while maintaining high professional standards.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related discipline.
	5 - 8 years of relevant experience in Finance, Audit, Internal Control, or Compliance.
	ACA, ICAN, or other relevant professional accounting certification is mandatory.
	Previous experience in the Banking or Microfinance sector is an added advantage.
	Strong knowledge of financial reporting, corporate governance, regulatory compliance, and risk management.
	Proficiency in financial software and Microsoft Excel.
	Excellent analytical, leadership, communication, and decision-making skills.

	This role is ideal for a commercially driven professional with strong technical knowledge of piping products and established relationships with EPC contractors, fabricators, and major industry stakeholders.

	Demonstrated success managing the Nigerian market and selling to EPC contractors and industrial clients.
	Strong technical understanding of process piping systems and associated products.
	Excellent negotiation, business development, and relationship management skills.

	Strategic thinker with excellent commercial judgment

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@kaphglobal.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

	Strong technical understanding of process piping systems and associated products.

  "description": "Pack &lsquo;N&rsquo; Pay is a product of CIC Integrated Services LTD. CIC was created as a wholesale store that supplies food to offshore catering companies to feed the offshore workers. Pack &rsquo;N&rsquo; Pay was created as a product that would leverage technology to solve the problems of retailers and wholesalers. Pack &lsquo;N&rsquo; Pay officially started operations on January 18th 2021 and launched her e-commerce website on March 1st 2021.

We are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Job Type: Full-Time
?Company: Pack&#39;N&#39;Pay Limited

Job Summary


	Pack&#39;N&#39;Pay is seeking a creative, innovative, and results-driven Social Media Manager to manage and grow our B2C digital presence across all key online platforms.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating engaging content, managing our social media communities, executing email marketing campaigns, supporting digital marketing initiatives, and driving measurable growth in brand awareness, customer engagement, lead generation, and conversions.
	This role is ideal for someone who understands digital trends, creates compelling content, and can turn creative ideas into business results.


Key Responsibilities
Content Creation &amp; Social Media Management:


	Develop and publish engaging, brand-aligned content for Facebook, Instagram, X (Twitter), TikTok, LinkedIn, and other relevant platforms.
	Create high-quality videos, graphics, reels, stories, and written content tailored to each audience and platform.
	Maintain a monthly content calendar to ensure consistent posting and alignment with marketing campaigns.
	Ensure brand consistency across all digital channels while optimizing content for maximum reach and engagement.


Email Marketing &amp; Campaign Management:


	Plan and execute email marketing campaigns, newsletters, promotional emails, and customer engagement campaigns.
	Manage and maintain the customer email database.
	Segment audiences to improve campaign relevance, customer engagement, and conversions.
	Monitor and optimize email campaign performance, including open rates, click-through rates, and conversions.


Engagement &amp; Community Building:


	Manage and grow Pack&#39;N&#39;Pay (B2C)&#39;s online communities by responding promptly to comments, messages, and enquiries.
	Build meaningful customer relationships through regular engagement and interactive content.
	Support customer experience by addressing customer feedback and escalating issues where necessary.
	Identify and engage influencers, content creators, and strategic partners that align with the Pack&#39;N&#39;Pay brand.


Analytics &amp; Performance:


	Monitor and analyse key performance metrics, including reach, engagement, follower growth, email performance, website traffic, and conversions.
	Track digital trends, competitor activities, and emerging opportunities to improve performance.
	Prepare weekly and monthly performance reports with actionable recommendations.
	Continuously optimize content and campaigns using data-driven insights.


Collaboration &amp; Campaign Support:


	Work closely with&nbsp;Sales, Marketing, Customer Experience, and Operations teams to support campaigns, promotions, and product launches.
	Provide live digital coverage during company events through photos, videos, stories, and live streaming.
	Contribute creative ideas for campaigns that increase customer acquisition, engagement, and retention.
	Perform any other duties as may be assigned by Management.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	OND, HND, or Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, Communications, Business Administration, or a related field.
	2&ndash;4 years of experience in social media management, digital marketing, or content marketing.
	Strong content creation skills, including graphics, video editing, and copywriting.
	Experience with Canva, CapCut, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar creative tools.
	Experience managing email marketing campaigns and email marketing platforms.
	Good understanding of social media algorithms, digital trends, and audience engagement strategies.
	Knowledge of Meta Business Suite, Google Analytics, SEO, and paid advertising is an added advantage.
	Excellent communication, creativity, and organisational skills.


What We Are Looking For:


	A highly creative storyteller with a passion for digital marketing.
	Someone who understands social media trends and audience behaviour.
	A proactive and self-motivated individual with a strong execution mindset.
	A data-driven marketer who uses insights to improve performance.
	A team player with excellent communication and collaboration skills.
	Someone who thrives in a fast-paced, growth-focused environment.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary.
	Performance-based incentives.
	HMO.
	Pension.
	13th Month Salary.
	Leave Allowance.
	Supportive and collaborative work environment.


Method of Application

        Pack ‘N’ Pay is a product of CIC Integrated Services LTD. CIC was created as a wholesale store that supplies food to offshore catering companies to feed the offshore workers. Pack ’N’ Pay was created as a product that would leverage technology to solve the problems of retailers and wholesalers. Pack ‘N’ Pay officially started operations on January 18th 2021 and launched her e-commerce website on March 1st 2021.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Job Type: Full-Time
?Company: Pack'N'Pay Limited

Job Summary

	This role is ideal for someone who understands digital trends, creates compelling content, and can turn creative ideas into business results.

	Maintain a monthly content calendar to ensure consistent posting and alignment with marketing campaigns.
	Ensure brand consistency across all digital channels while optimizing content for maximum reach and engagement.


Email Marketing & Campaign Management:


	Plan and execute email marketing campaigns, newsletters, promotional emails, and customer engagement campaigns.
	Manage and maintain the customer email database.
	Segment audiences to improve campaign relevance, customer engagement, and conversions.
	Monitor and optimize email campaign performance, including open rates, click-through rates, and conversions.


Engagement & Community Building:


	Manage and grow Pack'N'Pay (B2C)'s online communities by responding promptly to comments, messages, and enquiries.
	Build meaningful customer relationships through regular engagement and interactive content.
	Support customer experience by addressing customer feedback and escalating issues where necessary.
	Identify and engage influencers, content creators, and strategic partners that align with the Pack'N'Pay brand.


Analytics & Performance:


	Monitor and analyse key performance metrics, including reach, engagement, follower growth, email performance, website traffic, and conversions.
	Track digital trends, competitor activities, and emerging opportunities to improve performance.
	Prepare weekly and monthly performance reports with actionable recommendations.
	Continuously optimize content and campaigns using data-driven insights.


Collaboration & Campaign Support:


	Work closely with Sales, Marketing, Customer Experience, and Operations teams to support campaigns, promotions, and product launches.
	Provide live digital coverage during company events through photos, videos, stories, and live streaming.
	Contribute creative ideas for campaigns that increase customer acquisition, engagement, and retention.
	Perform any other duties as may be assigned by Management.

	OND, HND, or Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, Communications, Business Administration, or a related field.
	2–4 years of experience in social media management, digital marketing, or content marketing.
	Strong content creation skills, including graphics, video editing, and copywriting.
	Experience with Canva, CapCut, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar creative tools.
	Experience managing email marketing campaigns and email marketing platforms.

	A highly creative storyteller with a passion for digital marketing.
	Someone who understands social media trends and audience behaviour.
	A proactive and self-motivated individual with a strong execution mindset.
	A data-driven marketer who uses insights to improve performance.
	A team player with excellent communication and collaboration skills.
	Someone who thrives in a fast-paced, growth-focused environment.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary.
	Performance-based incentives.
	HMO.
	Pension.
	13th Month Salary.
	Leave Allowance.
	Supportive and collaborative work environment.
